title: QA/validation tool (Osmose / iD-rule integration) for human fixing
context: After human mappers add features from a task pack, a QA/validation pass is needed to flag likely errors (tagging mistakes, geometry issues, missing required tags) for human fixing before the experienced validator signs off. Osmose and iD/JOSM validation rules are the standard OSM QA tools for this. The tool must be read-only and emit a human-fixable worklist — no auto-fix or upload. The Osmose interface version must be pinned in specVersions.
objective: Build and ship a read-only QA/validation tool that pulls Osmose / iD-validation-style issues for a pack's area of interest and emits a human-fixable worklist.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool pulls Osmose and/or iD-validation-style issues for a pack's AoI and emits a human-fixable worklist; read-only; no auto-fix or upload code path.
Pinned Osmose interface version is recorded in specVersions.
Ships committed golden fixtures (pack AoI + synthetic Osmose/iD-rule input → expected worklist); pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint passes green.
Code is licensed MIT; commits are DCO signed-off.
output: A merged PR containing the read-only QA/validation tool (TypeScript/ESM), golden fixtures, passing CI, and specVersions recording the pinned Osmose interface version.
